gate.reading: UNIVERSAL (RSA) — independent models on DISJOINT data (different corpora, different dims, zero shared tokens) CONVERGE to a shared geometry when the latent structure is shared: same-structure RSA 0.42 vs different-structure control -0.00 (validity: identical 1.00, faithful 0.51). The geometry of meaning is STRUCTURE-DETERMINED, not data-specific. Convergence is partial at this synthetic scale (RSA 0.42, not 1.0) and tracks how faithfully each model captures the structure — consistent with stronger convergence at real scale (vec2vec).
